dialogos.texto_en: Five months have passed since that night.
After I confessed, it goes without saying\nthat there were some changes, big and small,\nin the relationships among the six of us.
We debated and sometimes clashed with each other\nfor the future each of us desired.
That way, we walked down what we thought was the best path.
In the end, Itsuki accepted my feelings\nafter much deliberation.
I don't know the details, but apparently she'd had\nthe advice and encouragement from her four sisters\nbehind her decision.
Jeez, even now, I'm still not on their level.
Of course, there have been changes in my relationship with the quintuplets, and their relationships with each other, but I feel like everything has finally fallen into place.
And then, graduation had approached,\nbefore we knew it%p-2;――
